title: Marque Diagnostic
description: One diagnostic record emitted by `marque check` or `marque fix --format json`. Streamed as NDJSON: one record per line. Contract version: marque-mvp-1.

rule.description: Stable rule identifier. E### = error, W### = warning, C### = correction.

severity.description: Effective severity after applying the merged configuration. Per FR-008, rules configured to severity `off` never execute and never produce a diagnostic, so `off` is unrepresentable on emitted records.

start.description: Inclusive byte offset into the original input.

end.description: Exclusive byte offset into the original input.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the violation. en-US for the MVP.

citation.description: CAPCO section reference, e.g. 'CAPCO-2023-§3.1'. Stable across MVP-1; consumers may use it for cross-linking.

fix.description: Optional FixProposal attached to this diagnostic. Pure data — no timestamp, no classifier identity. A proposal is only promoted to an AppliedFix (see audit-record.json) when Engine::fix runs and its confidence >= the configured threshold. Whether a given proposal was actually applied in a run is observable by correlating the diagnostic stream (stdout) with the AppliedFix stream (stderr) by rule + span.

source.description: Provenance of this proposal. Mirrors AppliedFix.source when promoted (see audit-record.json).

replacement.description: Replacement text to substitute for the bytes covered by the diagnostic span.

migration_ref.description: Optional reference into the CAPCO migration table or corrections-map that produced this proposal.
